Research Areas

Short CV

She is one of the two editors of the books "Digital Approaches in Communication Studies: Twitter" and "The Digital State of Games 1 - 2". In addition to public relations, Uğurlu Akbaş, whose studies focus on the topics of consumption philosophy, digital communication and digital game studies, has many papers and book chapters in Turkish and English, national and international in these fields.
